pr.title: Add non-record 16MB submission: MOEA outer-loop proxy F2 on 1xRTX 3090

output.summary: Distills MOEA outer-loop search into a compact GQA transformer with tied embeddings and a runnable proxy eval on 1x RTX 3090.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training was a standard proxy run, not an explicit validation-only regime.
techniques: MOEA outer-loop architecture/training search to artifact
Compact GQA transformer with tied embeddings and small dimensions
Proxy eval with reduced val window and compile disabled for 1x3090
